pageDescription: Generate detailed amortization schedules for loans with principal and interest breakdowns for each payment period to understand loan payoff progress

definition.title: Amortization Definition
definition.description: Process of paying off a loan with regular payments over time, with interest calculated on remaining balance

schedule.title: Amortization Schedule
schedule.description: Detailed table showing principal and interest portions of each payment over loan term

earlyPayments.title: Early Payment Impact
earlyPayments.description: Early payments are mostly interest; later payments are mostly principal

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides amortization schedule estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual loan terms may vary based on lender policies and fees

importantNotesList: Extra payments directly reduce principal and save on total interest
Bi-weekly payments can help pay off loans faster
Early in loan term, most payment goes to interest rather than principal
Amortization schedules help plan budget and understand loan progress

messages.enterInformation: Enter your loan information to generate amortization schedule
messages.resultMessage: Your amortization calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides amortization schedule estimates based on standard financial formulas. Actual loan terms, payments, and interest may vary based on lender policies, fees, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized loan advice and amortization analysis, consult financial advisors or loan officers with expertise in lending products and individual financial circumstances.

errors.loanAmount: Please enter a valid loan amount
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid annual interest rate
errors.loanTerm: Please enter a valid loan term
errors.startDate: Please enter a valid loan start date
errors.extraPayment: Please enter a valid extra payment amount
errors.loanTermUnit: Please select a loan term unit

tooltips.interestRate: Annual interest rate as a percentage
tooltips.loanTerm: Length of time to repay the loan
tooltips.startDate: Date when the loan payments begin
tooltips.extraPayment: Additional amount paid each month toward principal
tooltips.loanTermUnit: Unit of time for loan term (years or months)

generate_a_detailed_amortization_schedul:
Generate a detailed amortization schedule showing how each payment is split between principal and
                interest.
enter_loan_information_to_generate_sched: Enter loan information to generate schedule
enter_loan_details_to_see_summary_23: Enter loan details to see summary
generate_schedule_to_see_payment_details: Generate schedule to see payment details
how_to_use_the_amortization_calculator_3: How to Use the Amortization Calculator
the_amortization_calculator_is_a_powerfu: The amortization calculator is a powerful tool designed to help you understand the breakdown of your loan payments. Here’s how to use it:
input_the_total_amount_of_the_loan_you_w: Input the total amount of the loan you wish to calculate.
provide_the_annual_interest_rate_of_the_: Provide the annual interest rate of the loan.
choose_the_duration_of_the_loan_in_years: Choose the duration of the loan in years.
specify_the_date_when_the_loan_payments_: Specify the date when the loan payments will begin.
click_the_button_to_generate_the_amortiz: Click the button to generate the amortization schedule.
the_calculator_will_display_a_detailed_s: The calculator will display a detailed schedule showing each payment, the amount allocated to principal and interest, and the remaining balance.
